file: Cueto - 2025 - Enhanced production of jet fuel precursors via furfuralcyclopentanone aldol condensation by synergi.txt

experiments.description: 在80°C和100°C下，使用不同金属氧化物（Ca, Mg, Sn, Ti, Zr）改性的纳米ZSM-5沸石催化剂，催化糠醛（FFL）和环戊酮（CPO）的交叉羟醛缩合反应，生成喷气燃料前体FC和F2C。
experiments.text_snippet: Catalytic tests were carried out in a StartFish system at 80 and 100◦C, with 0.2 g of catalyst loading, under continuous stirring (750 rpm). A 10:1 M ratio of CPO (Sigma Aldrich, 99 %) to FFL (Sigma Aldrich, 99%) was selected... for the aldol condensation of furfural (FFL) and cyclopentanone (CPO).

Conversion rate.original: Reported as FFL conversion: 7.3-39.8% at 6h (depending on catalyst and temperature)

Product yield.original: FC+F2C yield: up to ~28% at 6h for TiO2/n-ZSM-5 at 100°C

Product Selectivity.original: Reported as selectivity to FC, FC-OH, F2C, CCP (e.g., 90.6% FC selectivity for n-ZSM-5 at 100°C, 6h)

Catalyst stability.original: TiO2/n-ZSM-5 deactivated upon reuse (45% of fresh activity) but regenerated by air calcination at 550°C

A 10:1 M ratio of CPO (Sigma Aldrich, 99 %) to FFL (Sigma Aldrich, 99%) was selected... for the aldol condensation of furfural (FFL) and cyclopentanone (CPO).
